form:Form.name: Filtro del reporte de la ig

form:Label.label: F.1357 / F.1359 - Liquidación IG - 4ta Cat. Rel. de Dependencia
form:Label.name: lbl_titulo

option.text: Liquidación Anual con Aj - dist Ene-Mar
Liquidación mensual - Año fiscal en curso
Liquidación Anual con Aj - dist Ene-Mar
Liquidación mensual - Año fiscal en curso

form:Button.descrip: Generar reporte resumen de la salida en txt
form:Button.name: btnReporte
form:Button.label: Reporte

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EMP.c_cuit FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP WHERE EMP.oi_empresa = {%=#SOURCE:@empresa%} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT L.e_periodo, L.f_liquidacion FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as L WHERE L.oi_liquidacion = {%=#SOURCE:@liquidacion%} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PEM.oi_personal_emp FROM LIQ19_EJECUCIONES AS E , LIQ99_LIQUIDACION AS L , LIQ99_RECIBOS AS R , LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS T , LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ AS PL , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PEM JOIN E.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER L.oi_liquidacion_ddo , L.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER R.oi_liquidacion_ddo , R.oi_tot_liq_per INNER T.oi_tot_liq_per , E.oi_liquidacion INNER PL.oi_liquidacion , PL.oi_personal_emp INNER PEM.oi_personal_emp WHERE L.c_estado = \'F\' AND E.oi_liquidacion = {%=string(#PARAM_GLOBALES:@liquidacion)%} AND PEM.f_egreso <= {Datetime(#PARAM_GLOBALES:@f_liq_hasta)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LEG.oi_personal_emp FROM LIQ19_EJECUCIONES AS E , LIQ99_LIQUIDACION AS L , LIQ99_RECIBOS AS R , LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS T , LIQ20_VAR_GR_CONC as GR , LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as p , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG ,ORG03_empresas as EMP JOIN E.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER L.oi_liquidacion_ddo, L.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER R.oi_liquidacion_ddo, R.oi_tot_liq_per INNER T.oi_tot_liq_per, T.oi_tot_liq_per INNER GR.oi_tot_liq_per, p.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER T.oi_per_emp_ddo, p.e_numero_legajo INNER LEG.e_numero_legajo, LEG.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa, EMP.c_empresa INNER p.c_empresa WHERE E.oi_liquidacion = {%=string(#PARAM_GLOBALES:@liquidacion)%} and L.c_estado = \'F\' AND GR.c_grupo = \'1\' AND GR.{%=#SOURCE:@c_columna%} = \'1\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: buscar_variable
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.c_columna FROM LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR, LIQ31_GRUPOS, LIQ09_variables JOIN LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.oi_grupo INNER LIQ31_GRUPOS.oi_grupo, LIQ09_variables.oi_variable INNER LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.oi_variable where LIQ31_GRUPOS.c_grupo = \'1\' and LIQ09_variables.c_variable = \'np_igotroagente\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: buscar_variable
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.c_columna FROM LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR, LIQ31_GRUPOS, LIQ09_variables JOIN LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.oi_grupo INNER LIQ31_GRUPOS.oi_grupo, LIQ09_variables.oi_variable INNER LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.oi_variable where LIQ31_GRUPOS.c_grupo = \'1\' and LIQ09_variables.c_variable = \'np_igotroagente\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LEG.oi_personal_emp FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, LIQ07_VAL_VAREF as VV, LIQ09_VARIABLES as VR JOIN LEG.oi_personal_emp INNER VV.oi_personal_emp, VV.oi_variable INNER VR.oi_variable
WHERE VV.n_valor = 0
{%?('##empresa##'!='') {% and LEG.oi_empresa = ##empresa## %} {% %} %}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT EMP.d_empresa, LEG.oi_personal_emp, LEG.e_numero_legajo, PER.d_ape_y_nom, LIQ25.oi_liquidacion, SEC.policy
FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as LIQ25, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\') as SEC
JOIN PER.oi_personal INNER LEG.oi_personal, LEG.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa, LEG.oi_personal_emp INNER LIQ25.oi_personal_emp, LEG.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER SEC.id
WHERE 1=1 {%?('##activos##'='1') {% and LEG.oi_indic_activo= \'1\' %} {% %} %} {%?('##empresa##'!='') {% and LEG.oi_empresa = ##empresa## %} {% %} %} {%?('##oi_liquidacionFil##'!='') {% and LIQ25.oi_liquidacion = ##oi_liquidacionFil## %} {% %} %} {%?('##nombre##'!='') {% and contain(UCASE(PER.d_ape_y_nom), UCASE(\'##nombre##\')) %} {% %} %} {%?('##documento##'!='') {% and contain(PER.c_nro_documento, \'##documento##\') %} {% %} %} {%?('##sexo##'!='') {% and PER.c_sexo = \'##sexo##\' %} {% %} %} {%?('##grupo_sanguineo##'!='') {% and PER.oi_grupo_sanguineo = \'##grupo_sanguineo##\' %} {% %} %} {%? ('##cb_confidenciales##'!='' and '##cb_confidenciales##'!='T' ) {% {%? ('##cb_confidenciales##'='C') {% AND LEG.l_confidencial = 1%}{% AND LEG.l_confidencial = 0 %} %} %} {% %} %} ORDER BY d_empresa ASC, e_numero_legajo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW
